A custom TextFieldTableCell that commits the edit when the TextField loses focus.

forceCompanyLoad(Long, Company) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CurrentCompany
Convenience helper that sets both the active company identifier and the aggregate.
forceCompanyLoad(Company) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CurrentCompany
For test environments or specialized workflows where the caller needs to directly set the current Company and immediately notify all CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListeners, this helper provides that ability.
